title: Interpret Unknown Inducted Parcels As Using OptiSweep Default Dimensions
summary: Use this source-backed reference to interpret parcel data state when a parcel appears as unknown inducted. The training source states that before sorter entry, the first Chat message should provide tracking ID, dimensions, and package type. If that message fails and the parcel is seen as unknown inducted, OptiSweep assigns default dimensions.
when_to_use: Use when reviewing parcel data or message status and you need to determine whether an unknown inducted parcel may be carrying OptiSweep default dimensions because the first Chat message failed.
not_for: Do not use this source as a corrective workflow for restoring message flow or changing parcel data.
Do not use this source to assume or document actual default dimension values.
Do not use this source when the parcel state cannot be matched to the source-described first message failure and unknown inducted condition.

roles_and_responsibilities.responsibility: Review parcel state and available message-status information against the source-described parcel lifecycle and interpret whether default dimensions may have been assigned.

safety_notes: This is an interpretation/reference procedure only; the source does not provide corrective actions.
Do not invent corrective actions, controls, or default dimension values beyond the documented source meaning.
access_or_tools_needed: Access to parcel data or message status information
Source documentation or training slide describing the first Chat message and default dimension behavior

access_required: Access to parcel data or message status information
Access to the source documentation or training slide for verification
system_preconditions: A parcel state or record is available for review.
Message-status information is available enough to determine whether the first Chat message is present or failed.
external_references: UPSFORTNA OptiSweep Training Day 1 training content, page 11 / segment training_video_day1_segment_0011

visual_references.description: Training slide showing the parcel lifecycle context, including the first Chat message fields and the statement that unknown inducted parcels are assigned default dimensions if the first message fails.

steps.title: Check first Chat message fields
steps.purpose: Verify whether the source-required first message data exists for the parcel before sorter entry.

steps.title: Interpret failed first message as default-dimension assignment condition
steps.purpose: Apply the source statement that links first-message failure and unknown inducted state to default dimensions.
steps.instruction: If the first Chat message is not present or is described as failed, compare the parcel state to the source statement that unknown inducted parcels are assigned default dimensions by OptiSweep.
steps.expected_result: You determine whether the parcel matches the source-described condition for default-dimension assignment.
steps.healthy_condition: The parcel state and message failure align with the source statement about unknown inducted parcels receiving default dimensions.
steps.failure_condition: The parcel does not clearly match both the failed first-message condition and the unknown inducted condition.

steps.title: Record interpretation of parcel dimensions
steps.purpose: Document the source-backed interpretation so the parcel state is not mistaken for measured dimensions.
steps.instruction: Record that the parcel dimensions may be default dimensions rather than measured dimensions when the source-backed failure condition is observed.
steps.expected_result: The parcel review notes reflect that dimensions may be default dimensions due to the failed first message and unknown inducted condition.
steps.healthy_condition: The interpretation is documented as a source-backed possibility, not as an unsupported measured fact.
steps.failure_condition: The parcel dimensions are treated as measured dimensions without support, or the interpretation is recorded without the source-backed condition being met.

actions.label: Document interpretation
actions.exact_action: Record that the parcel dimensions may be default dimensions rather than measured dimensions when the source-backed failure condition is observed.

stop_or_escalate_if: Stop and escalate if you cannot confirm the source-backed failure condition before documenting the interpretation.
Do not assume the actual default dimension values from the transcript because the values are discussed informally and not clearly documented in the slide content.
